title: Grid areas & placement
description: Place items explicitly with lines, spans, and named areas.

questions.explanation: Lines number the edges: `1 / 3` covers two columns between line 1 and 3.

options: Item spans 2 column tracks from its auto position
questions.explanation: The `span` keyword tells the item to occupy N tracks.

questions.prompt: Which property lets you refer to areas by NAME?
questions.explanation: grid-template-areas assigns strings; items use grid-area: <name>.

questions.prompt: How many rows does the grid define?
questions.explanation: Each string in grid-template-areas is one row.
A dot marks an empty (unnamed) cell in the template.

questions.prompt: grid-row: 1 / span 2 — how many rows does it cover?
questions.explanation: Starts at row line 1, spans 2 rows.

questions.prompt: Which places an item at the last column edge, regardless of count?
questions.explanation: Negative line numbers count from the end. -1 = last line.
